meaning: n.折衷主义,折衷主义的运动
examples: Eclecticism is the use of doctrines, methods, or styles from various sources.
The eclecticism of the designs means it is difficult to define one overall look.
There was, after all, something charming about the blithe eclecticism of this worldview.
Despite this eclecticism, explaining his investment philosophy does not come easily to Mr Mobius.
On closer inspection, the eclecticism and asymmetry of Richard Morris Hunt's design come into focus.
